case_title: WILLIAMS, STEVEN vs. SMITH, THOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, THOMAS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-22-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-02-1996
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-30-1996, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON OCT-10-1996 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(D) APPEARANCE ON 8/30/96 IS WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON FEB-10-1997

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: $100.00 SANCTIONS IMPOSED BUT STAYED PENDING COMPLIANCE. ON FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR DISMISSAL. HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, THOMAS
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-19-1996, CONTINUED TO AUG-30-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FILING AN ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, THOMAS
ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-22-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-22-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, STEVEN SERVED JUL-18-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, THOMAS
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, THOMAS ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO DEFT SEE AWARD AT LENGTH
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, SOUZA, RONALD JAY (062862), ARB-5 MAILED
